title: XRP price in ‘value zone’ near $1.40 as whales pull $170M from exchanges
summary: Whales withdrew $170 million in XRP from Binance as the price holds a key $1.35-$1.40 accumulation and support zone.

title: CoinQuant introduces trading infrastructure for the agent economy
summary: CoinQuant, the AI-powered no-code trading platform that has attracted over 15,000 users since launch, today announces its expansion into a unified trading intelligence architecture built for both human traders and autonomous AI agents.

title: Emerging-Market Assets Rally as Iran Hopes Boost Risk Appetite
summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies rose Monday as signs that the US and Iran are nearing a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz pushed oil prices below $100 per barrel and boosted risk appetite.

title: Cox Group Took 54% Bridge Loan for Deal to Buy Iberdrola Mexico
summary: Spanish utility Cox ABG Group SA took a 54% bridge loan to help fund a $4.2 billion asset acquisition in Mexico and placed shares as collateral.

The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
Bitcoin is invisible code — but for over a decade, creators have turned it into coins, cards, and USBs you can touch. Here’s how close we’ve gotten to real, cash-like BTC.

title: Vitalik Buterin Signals Shift to 'Smaller Ship' at Ethereum Foundation Amid Departures
summary: Buterin revealed that 90% of his net worth is tied up in Ethereum.

title: Pope Leo Releases First AI Encyclical, Calls Data a Common Good and Rejects Moral Neutrality of Tech
summary: The 245-paragraph document was presented alongside Anthropic co-founder Christopher Olah, whose company is actively suing the Trump administration over military AI use.

title: ‘We don’t know who deployed this’: Squid distances itself from $3.2 million third-party module exploit
summary: Squid said its core protocol was unaffected after a third-party module named SquidRouterModule was exploited for roughly $3.2 million.

title: Indonesia blocks Polymarket amid crackdown on online betting
summary: Indonesia blocked Polymarket over online gambling concerns as regulators widen global scrutiny of prediction market platforms.

title: Iran’s top negotiators travel to Qatar amid intensified efforts to secure deal
summary: Tehran’s parliamentary speaker and lead negotiator travelled to Doha as mediators seek to thrash out final details

title: Two LNG tankers pass through Strait of Hormuz
summary: Another vessel carrying crude oil crossed the vital shipping lane on Saturday
